north_star: With R GB of RAM, running scenario S, how many pipelines can run simultaneously - per-OS, per-deployment, conservative.
reason: Memory footprint + capacity is a heavy, opt-in suite (real Chromium/Qdrant model servers). Per-tier results land as contributors run `python -m melaya_bench_framework.memory`.
next_action: Publish the first measured tier (S0 idle + S1 LLM-agnostic baseline) from the reference box, then the per-component ladder and the capacity N-sweep.
two_subjects: Pipeline (LLM-agnostic: heap+browser+qdrant+buffers, never model weights) measured separately from the model server (Ollama/LM Studio, weights once, counted vs the box only when co-located).
